title: eriobotrya fragrans var. fragrans
intro: Eriobotrya fragrans var. fragrans, also known as the Loquat, is a subtropical evergreen tree native to Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of Eriobotrya fragrans var. fragrans include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Loquat include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Eriobotrya fragrans var. fragrans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
